## Added
- **Piglins and Hoglins are now capturable.** Both are shipped in the default `always_capturable` tag, so the Capture Net can pick them up — relocate Piglins to set up a bartering hall, or move Hoglins for a food farm. As in vanilla, a Piglin or Hoglin released **outside the Nether** zombifies after ~15 seconds (→ Zombified Piglin / Zoglin), so plan their new home accordingly.

## Notes
- Modpacks can opt out by adding `minecraft:piglin` / `minecraft:hoglin` to the `capturenet:cannot_capture` tag (the blocklist takes precedence).
